meta.name: Public Figures
meta.description: Stores representations of public figures and notable individuals derived from external sources. strictly excludes private individuals.
invariants: Personas must be grounded in verifiable public records.
Private individuals are strictly excluded from this domain.
Representations must be neutral and based on public actions/statements.
Relationships to organizations and events must be explicit.
Biographical data must be accurate and sourced.
No inference of private mental states; model only expressed public persona.
